'''Otalp''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Squidge]] and the den-brother of [[Remoh (Squidge)|Remoh]] who lived long after the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. His species was being oppressed by the [[Vindar]].

==Biography==
Inspired by a vision from his den-mother, Otalp set out in search of [[C-3PO/Legends|the storyteller]] with a skeptical Remoh in tow. After a long journey, they found the storyteller, broken down and inactive, in a cave. After they reactivated him, the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] told them a tale of a [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|hero]] who led the fight against a [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|dark oppressor]] and brought hope to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. When Vindar discovered the cave, Otalp told Remoh to hide, and gave his life to protect his brother.

==Behind the scenes==
The names of Otalp and his brother Remoh are [[Wikipedia:Ananym|ananyms]] of [[Wikipedia:Plato|Plato]] and [[Wikipedia:Homer|Homer]] respectively. Both Plato and Homer were [[Wikipedia:Greeks|figures]] of [[Wikipedia:Ancient Greece|ancient Greece]].
